repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 23: Couldn't resolve reference to 'impl_1'.: AGREE cannot resolve component instance references (like Task.impl_1) in a component type annex; only component type names are visible, not instance names. -> Replace all occurrences of 'Task.impl_1' with 'Task' to reference the component type, not the instance.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 23: Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: AGREE does not recognize AADL property names like 'period' as direct field accesses; must use the correct property name 'Period' as defined in AADL. -> Replace 'period' with 'Period' to match the exact AADL property name.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 24: no viable alternative at input '"Periodic"': AGREE does not accept string literals for enumeration properties like Dispatch_Protocol; must use the AADL enumeration literal name without quotes. -> Replace '"Periodic"' with 'Periodic' (without quotes).
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 25: mismatched input 'ms' expecting ';': AGREE does not parse AADL units (e.g., 'ms') in expressions; units must be removed and values treated as dimensionless. -> Remove all unit literals ('ms') from all numeric comparisons.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 26: Couldn't resolve reference to 'priority'.: AADL property is named 'Priority', not 'priority'; case mismatch causes unresolved reference. -> Replace 'priority' with 'Priority' to match the exact AADL property name.

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex references component properties using incorrect scope or syntax -> Change 'Task.Period' to 'Period' in the assume statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex references component properties using incorrect scope or syntax -> Change 'Task.Dispatch_Protocol' to 'Dispatch_Protocol' in the assume statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE annex references component properties using incorrect scope or syntax -> Change 'Task.Compute_Execution_time' to 'Compute_Execution_time' in the assume statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex references component properties using incorrect scope or syntax -> Change 'Task.Priority' to 'Priority' in the assume statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex references component properties using incorrect scope or syntax -> Change 'Task.Period' to 'Period' in the guarantee statement

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type scope -> Remove all property references (Period, Dispatch_Protocol, Compute_Execution_time, Priority) from the AGREE annex in Task type
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type scope -> Remove all property references (Period, Dispatch_Protocol, Compute_Execution_time, Priority) from the AGREE annex in Task type
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Compute_Execution_time'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type scope -> Remove all property references (Period, Dispatch_Protocol, Compute_Execution_time, Priority) from the AGREE annex in Task type
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE cannot resolve property references from component type scope -> Remove all property references (Period, Dispatch_Protocol, Compute_Execution_time, Priority) from the AGREE annex in Task type
Byte_Count (property association) does not point to anything: Property Byte_Count referenced but not defined in model -> Remove or define Byte_Count property in model
